name: Roasted Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots, sugar, and salt in water until tender.
2. Drain and cool the cooked vegetables.
3. Dip the vegetables into butter.
4. Roll the vegetables in crushed cornflake crumbs.
5. Place the vegetables on a greased baking tray.
6. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes.
